metadata.purpose: Additional 40 questions covering AI/ML, security, n8n, ACD/L5X, and database areas

questions.question: What is the default OpenAI model used for fine-tuning in plc-gbt, and what base model is it derived from?
questions.answer: ft:gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18:whiskey-house:plc-gbt:CMx89NDT, derived from gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18

questions.question: What are the three critical behavior keywords emphasized in the OpenAI service system prompt for truth-seeking responses?
questions.answer: TRUTH-SEEKING, CONCISE, HONEST

questions.question: What temperature value is used in the OpenAI chat completion API to ensure deterministic responses?
What OpenAI seed value is configured in plc-gbt for reproducible responses?
questions.answer: 1 (OPENAI_SEED=1)

questions.question: What is the purpose of the neural_tuning.py module in the plc-gbt AI integration?
questions.answer: Provides neural network-based auto-tuning for PID controllers, using historical process data to optimize control parameters

questions.question: What RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) database is used to store PLC program context for AI assistance?
questions.answer: Neo4j knowledge graph for storing and querying PLC program context, control loop structures, and tuning parameters

questions.question: What is the trainer_callback.py module used for in the OpenAI fine-tuning workflow?
questions.answer: Provides callback functions for monitoring and controlling the OpenAI fine-tuning job progress, including early stopping and metric logging

questions.question: What environment variable stores the OpenAI API key for AI service authentication?
questions.answer: OPENAI_API_KEY

questions.question: What is the max_tokens parameter typically used in OpenAI completions for PLC assistance queries?
questions.answer: 1000-2000 tokens for detailed explanations, configurable per request

questions.question: How does plc-gbt's AI assistant handle domain-specific PLC terminology in responses?
questions.answer: Uses a fine-tuned model trained on PLC control loop data with domain-specific system prompts that enforce accurate industrial automation terminology

questions.question: What connection mode is enforced by default in plc-gbt to prevent accidental PLC modifications?
questions.answer: READ_ONLY mode

questions.question: What port does the mTLS proxy expose in the docker-compose configuration for secure API access?
What decorator is used in the CLI to enforce permission levels for protected operations?
questions.answer: @requires_permission decorator with ADMIN, OPERATOR, or VIEWER permission levels

questions.question: What permission level is required to delete a control loop instance?
questions.answer: ADMIN

questions.question: What validation level includes simulation testing before deployment to verify safe operation?
questions.answer: ADVANCED (includes standard + simulation testing)

questions.question: What is the default session timeout value for the CLI security session?
questions.answer: 3600 seconds (1 hour)

questions.question: What are the four validation levels and their hierarchy from least to most strict?
questions.answer: BASIC → STANDARD → ADVANCED → PRODUCTION (each level includes all validations from previous levels)

questions.question: What soft delete mechanism is used in the file storage service for audit compliance?
questions.answer: deleted_at timestamp column (records are marked deleted rather than removed)

questions.question: What is the purpose of the n8n-mcp module in the plc-gbt stack?
questions.answer: Provides Model Context Protocol integration for n8n, enabling AI-assisted workflow automation

questions.question: What PostgreSQL database name is used for N8N workflows in docker-compose?
questions.answer: plc_gbt

questions.question: What is the relationship between n8n-framework and plc-gbt event handling?
questions.answer: n8n-framework enables visual workflow design connecting PLC events to notifications, data logging, and external system triggers through event-driven architecture

questions.question: What type of workflows can be automated using n8n in the plc-gbt stack?
questions.answer: PLC monitoring, alerting, automated responses, data logging, and external system integration workflows

questions.question: What three workflow priority levels are defined in WorkflowMetadata?
questions.answer: low, medium, high

questions.question: What is the purpose of the WorkflowState type in workflow management?
questions.answer: Tracks workflow execution state including status (pending, running, completed, failed), start/end timestamps, and error information

questions.question: What is the core purpose of plc-gbt's ACD to L5X conversion capability?
questions.answer: Enables GitHub-based version control for PLC programs by converting proprietary .ACD files to diff-friendly XML-based .L5X format

questions.question: Why are .ACD files unsuitable for traditional version control systems?
questions.answer: .ACD files are proprietary binary archives that cannot be meaningfully diffed or merged, making code review and change tracking impossible

questions.question: What are the three Rockwell/Allen-Bradley controller families supported by plc-gbt?
questions.answer: ControlLogix, CompactLogix, and Micro800

questions.question: What are the capacity differences between ControlLogix and Micro800 controllers in terms of max programs and tags?
questions.answer: ControlLogix: 1000 programs, 250K tags. Micro800: 10 programs, 1000 tags

questions.question: What is the external library used for ACD to L5X conversion in plc-gbt?
questions.answer: acd-l5x-tool-lib

questions.question: What file format is .L5X based on?
questions.answer: XML (Extensible Markup Language)

questions.question: What DevOps capabilities are enabled by converting .ACD to .L5X format?
questions.answer: Meaningful diffs, pull request reviews, merge conflict resolution, CI/CD pipeline integration, and branch-based development workflows

questions.question: Which controller family has the highest I/O module capacity?
questions.answer: ControlLogix with 128 I/O modules (vs CompactLogix with limited, Micro800 with minimal)

questions.question: Which controller family supports motion control capabilities?
questions.answer: ControlLogix (full motion support) and CompactLogix (limited motion). Micro800 does not support motion control.

questions.question: How does plc-gbt bridge process control engineers and software developers?
questions.answer: Translates PLC concepts into software paradigms: git workflows via .L5X conversion, JSON schemas for control loops, CLI interfaces, React/Next.js dashboards, and AI explanations
questions.source_hint: Multiple sources: CLI, UI, schemas, AI integration

questions.question: What hashing algorithm is used by FileStorageService for file integrity verification?
questions.answer: SHA-256

questions.question: What is the default chunk_size in bytes for file processing in FileStorageService?
questions.answer: 8192 bytes

questions.question: What is the maximum number of command results stored in CLIExecutor's command_history?
What database is used for Neo4j knowledge graph storage in the RAG architecture?
questions.answer: Neo4j graph database for storing PLC program context, control loop structures, and relationship data

questions.question: What is the default FILE_STORAGE_ROOT path for the CLI API bridge file storage?
questions.answer: /Users/reh3376/repos/plc-gbt/file-storage

questions.question: What React Query cache settings are configured for data fetching in the UI?
questions.answer: staleTime: 5 minutes (300000ms), gcTime: 10 minutes (600000ms)
